html:
Exclusive to:

Shark Gills are an Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is obtained by killing the Tiger Shark or its Sharkittens. It can be used to craft the Dumbrella and the Sea Sack.

Shark Gills also make an excellent sacrifice at the Volcano Altar of Snackrifice, delaying the Volcano's eruption by two full days.

Shark Gills also make an excellent sacrifice at the Volcano Altar of Snackrifice, delaying the Volcano's eruption by two full days.

'''Shark Gills''' are an [[Item]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is obtained by killing the [[Tiger Shark]] or its [[Sharkitten]]s. It can be used to craft the [[Dumbrella]] and the [[Sea Sack]].

Shark Gills also make an excellent sacrifice at the [[Volcano Altar of Snackrifice]], delaying the [[Volcano]]'s eruption by two full days.

== {{pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Shark Gills
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Umbrella
|item3 = Straw Hat
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Dumbrella}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Shark Gills
|item2 = Vine
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Seaweed
|count3 = 5
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Sea Sack}}
